title: pedilonum ophioglossum
intro: Pedilonum ophioglossum, also known as adder's tongue fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asparagaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pedilonum ophioglossum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
